mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_htank_equip_code, se_htank_name, se_htank_spec, se_htank_design_volume, se_htank_operating_volume, se_htank_design_p, se_htank_operating_p, se_htank_design_t, se_htank_operating_t, se_htank_media, se_htank_material, se_htank_thickness, se_htank_seal_type, se_htank_anti_corrosion, se_htank_support_type, se_htank_safety_valve_model, se_htank_install_pos, se_htank_in_service, se_htank_inspect_cycle, se_htank_last_inspect, se_htank_next_inspect, se_htank_inspect_result, se_htank_last_pressure_test, se_htank_level_gauge_model, se_htank_corrosion_status, se_htank_maintain_record, se_htank_fault_record, se_htank_operator, se_htank_create_time, se_htank_update_time, se_htank_status, se_htank_factory, se_htank_reserve1, se_htank_reserve2, se_htank_reserve3 FROM se_horizontal_tank
and se_htank_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seHtankEquipCode}, '%')
and se_htank_name like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHtankName}, '%')
and se_htank_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHtankStatus}, '%')
and se_htank_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHtankFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_htank_equip_code, se_htank_name, se_htank_spec, se_htank_design_volume, se_htank_operating_volume, se_htank_design_p, se_htank_operating_p, se_htank_design_t, se_htank_operating_t, se_htank_media, se_htank_material, se_htank_thickness, se_htank_seal_type, se_htank_anti_corrosion, se_htank_support_type, se_htank_safety_valve_model, se_htank_install_pos, se_htank_in_service, se_htank_inspect_cycle, se_htank_last_inspect, se_htank_next_inspect, se_htank_inspect_result, se_htank_last_pressure_test, se_htank_level_gauge_model, se_htank_corrosion_status, se_htank_maintain_record, se_htank_fault_record, se_htank_operator, se_htank_create_time, se_htank_update_time, se_htank_status, se_htank_factory, se_htank_reserve1, se_htank_reserve2, se_htank_reserve3 FROM se_horizontal_tank
and se_htank_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seHtankEquipCode}, '%')
and se_htank_name like CONCAT ('%',#{seHtankName}, '%')
and se_htank_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seHtankStatus}, '%')
and se_htank_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seHtankFactory}, '%')
